---
title: "Page Not Found"
sidebar: false
page-layout: custom
---
<div style="min-height: 60vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; padding: 4rem 2rem;">

<div style="font-size: 5rem; font-weight: 900; color: #E2E8F0; letter-spacing: -0.04em; line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">404</div>

<h1 style="font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0F172A; margin-bottom: 0.75rem;">Page not found.</h1>

<p style="color: #64748B; max-width: 400px; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.7;">
The page you're looking for doesn't exist. It may have moved, or the URL might be incorrect.
</p>

<div style="display: flex; gap: 0.875rem; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center;">
  <a href="/" class="btn-primary-custom">← Go Home</a>
  <a href="/tutorials/00_hello_roofline.html" class="btn-outline-custom">Start Tutorial</a>
  <a href="/zoo/index.html" class="btn-outline-custom">Browse the Zoo</a>
</div>

</div>
